untranslatable_reason: TED spread is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The signal requires external macro data (TED spread level and 3-year median) which is not available in the provided price/technical indicator set. Additionally, the relationship is factor-based (BAB factor returns vs. TED spread) rather than price-action based, requiring external data integration beyond standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a macro factor relationship: BAB (Betting Against Beta) factor returns show negative correlation with TED spread levels (coefficients: US stocks -0.033, global -0.013, all assets -0.016; t-stat -8.29). Entry when TED spread exceeds 3-year median (credit stress), exit when it normalizes. This requires external macro data feed (TED spread) not available in standard backtest engine. Data period: Dec 1984 - Dec 2009.
